_about: Phase 1 demo graph for the Flow A chat-billboard pattern. See dev-notes/modules/signal-graph.md and dev-notes/modules/spawn.md. Before importing: fill in the four placeholder ids marked with TODO in defaultConfig (overlive account id, template clip id, optional account-channel filter). Import via PUT /api/graphs/:id with the descriptor field set to this JSON object minus the leading underscore-prefixed metadata keys.
_setup: 1. Create a scene_node of kind 'text_canvas' in the scene you want overlays in. Mark it hidden (it's a template; spawns will be auto-unhidden).

2. Author a track_clip owned by that node, mode='relative', loop=false, duration=4. Add one lane targeting position.x with keyframes that sweep the value across the viewport (e.g. -3 at t=0, +3 at t=4).
3. Hook up an overlive account in TopBar > Overlive Accounts so chat events flow.
4. Fill in the TODO defaultConfig values below: overliveAccountId on the overlive_chat_message node, clipId on the spawn_clip node.
5. Create a project-scoped graph (POST /api/projects/:projectId/graphs) and PUT this descriptor (minus the _* meta keys) into its descriptor field.
6. Send a chat message; you should see a tmp text_canvas spawn at a randomised x and animate across the screen.
label: Chat → Flying Billboard
